title: Simple Vanish mod
description: This is simple Vanish mod. Use command /vanish on and /vanish off
body:
# Simple vanish mod
You can use this vanish mod for both client and server. What does the mod do? After entering a specific command, it will give you an invisibility effect for an infinite time. After entering another command, it will remove this effect.

This mod was created with Mcreator

## How to use this mod
This mod is very simple for usage:
  - For vanish you type /vanish on in chat
  - For unvanish you type /vanish off in chat

## Updating
THIS IS NOT FINAL VERSION OF THIS MOD! I will be updating this mod.

At this moment, i will be updating it for other minecraft versions. I would like to add more features in the future.
